claim_bullets.bullet_text: Array elements can be extracted using [ and ] as postfix operators. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.102-103)
We know that every array is its own unique entity, with its own unique reference. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.102-103)

source_record_text: This section covers element references in JavaScript arrays, detailing how to extract elements using bracket notation and explaining that arrays store references to the objects placed in them.
